operation.expression: (:Custom headers are necessary to ensure the correct column order in the generated file:) ( <Header> <fieldIndex>1</fieldIndex> <name>SenderTransmissionNo</name> </Header>, <Header> <fieldIndex>2</fieldIndex> <name>PayloadtoGTM</name> </Header> )

parameter.name: i_EmailSubject
i_EmailBody
parameter.expression:
let $nl := "
"
let $string := fn:concat( 'AI Process: ', $temp.tmp_ProcessName, $nl, 'Env/Org: ', $temp.tmp_OrgName, $nl, 'AI Process Id: ', util:getProcessId(), $nl, 'AI Process - JDE data Log file.', $nl, $nl, 'Message: Log file information for JDE(Customer Supplier) processed records. For more details, Refer below listed file.', $nl, 'Log data file name: ', $temp.tmp_LogFileName , $nl, 'Log data file location: ',fn:concat( $temp.tmp_InfaShared_Root_Dir , '/Logs/JDE/toGTM'), $nl,
$nl, $nl, 'Regards,', $nl, 'Informatica Support,', $nl, $temp.tmp_EmailRegards )
return $string

parameter.name: i_EmailSubject
i_EmailBody
parameter.expression:
let $nl := "
"
let $string := fn:concat( 'AI Process: ', $temp.tmp_ProcessName, $nl, 'Env/Org: ', $temp.tmp_OrgName, $nl, 'AI Process Id: ', util:getProcessId(), $nl, $nl, 'Message: No records were processed from JDE(Customer Supplier) tables to GTM.', $nl,
$nl, $nl, 'Regards,', $nl, 'Informatica Support,', $nl, $temp.tmp_EmailRegards )
return $string

operation.expression: (:Custom headers are necessary to ensure the correct column order in the generated file:) ( <Header> <fieldIndex>1</fieldIndex> <name>SenderTransmissionNo</name> </Header>, <Header> <fieldIndex>2</fieldIndex> <name>PayloadtoGTM</name> </Header>, <Header> <fieldIndex>3</fieldIndex> <name>ErrorCode</name> </Header>, <Header> <fieldIndex>4</fieldIndex> <name>ErrorDetail</name> </Header>, <Header> <fieldIndex>5</fieldIndex> <name>ErrorReason</name> </Header> )

parameter.name: i_EmailSubject
i_EmailBody
parameter.expression:
let $nl := "
"
let $string := fn:concat( 'AI Process: ', $temp.tmp_ProcessName, $nl, 'Env/Org: ', $temp.tmp_OrgName, $nl, 'AI Process Id: ', util:getProcessId(), $nl, 'AI Process - Failed with data errors due to the following reason(s).', $nl, $nl, 'Error Message: GTM Api call(s) failed while Sending JDE customer supplier data. For more details, Refer below listed error file.', $nl, 'Error data file name: ', $temp.tmp_Errordata_fileName , $nl, 'Error data file location: ', fn:concat( $temp.tmp_InfaShared_Root_Dir , '/ErrorFiles/JDE/toGTM'), $nl, 'Check the records in the error log file using the value of the below XML field (Contact Gid) as the unique key, which is derived from JDE fields F0101_ABAN8.', $nl,
'/TransmissionBody/GLogXMLElement/gtm:Contact/otm:ContactGid/otm:Gid/otm:Xid', $nl, $nl, $nl, 'Regards,', $nl, 'Informatica Support,', $nl, $temp.tmp_EmailRegards )
return $string

operation.expression:
if (exists($temp.tmp_JDEdata_Head/F0101_ABTAX/text()) and normalize-space($temp.tmp_JDEdata_Head/F0101_ABTAX/text()) != '') then fn:replace( $temp.tmp_JDEdata_Head/F0101_ABTAX/text(), '^"|"$', '' ) else 'No Data'
(:fn:replace( $temp.tmp_JDEdata_Head/F0101_ABTAX/text(), '^"|"$', '' ):)
